text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after tryouts, I catch sight of Special Week at the school
cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that was delicious! Phew, nothing beats a nice carrot hamburger
steak!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Their carrot sauté was great too! Oh, and the carrot yakisoba! Even
the carrot gratin! Carrots galore! ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I'm surprised you're able to say that after three servings of,
well... everything! I dunno how you do it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And if we look over here... Helloooo? El? Still alive?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Urk... I could only keep up with you until your second serving, but
three? You really are something else, Spe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um... El?! Are you feeling all right?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You just noticed? She's been like this for a while now. You gotta pay
more attention to your surroundings, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hey, El? We have a scrimmage after this... Are you going to be okay?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
D-don't worry about me! Just a bit full, that's all. I'm the invincible
condor...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'll get better before we start our race!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Trying to get a lead before the race even begins, huh? I gotta say,
Spe, you're quite the tactician.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I am not! C'mon, El! Please pull yourself together!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I told you... I'm fine! Burp.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, Spe, you don't need to say please every time something
happens!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I thought I told you to quit being so tense! Loosen up a bit! Talk to
me like you would to any other classmate!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You did say that, didn't ya? I thought it was funny to hear coming
from you, though. You're just as polite as she is!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's just easier for me to be this way! But enough about me! It's Spe
we're talking about now!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I guess... you're right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sorry... I just don't wanna sound rude or anything. I get super nervous
when I talk to people, so I end up being too polite. It's a bad habit, I
know.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I was worried that I wouldn't be able to get along with anybody,
y'know? Especially at the start, ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's your first time being around other girls your age, not to mention
other Umamusume, right? You sure are shy for someone so friendly!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ya gotta kick back and relax once in a while! Live a little, y'know?
Just take it from me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: How about we ditch class and go fishing?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Kick back and... relax? Like you do? I'm not sure that's really...
possible?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, who worries about having fun?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week enjoys a hearty meal with her friends, lost in
conversation from the first to the very last bite.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week finally notices my presence and runs over to me to chat.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Have you tried the carrot hamburger steak? It's amazing!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe food this delicious is free! And all-you-can-eat too!
Tracen Academy sure pulls out all the stops!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And the cherry on top is being able to eat with my friends! Ehehe...
I'm so glad I could enroll here.
choice_data_list: You're really enjoying the student life, huh?
You're really enjoying the student life, huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh! El and Sei... Grass and King too... They're all so nice to me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I grew up alone with my mom, so ever since I was little, I wanted a
friend I could talk to or run with!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So being able to chat with my friends and compete with each other
like this is like a dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, I sent my mom a letter with a picture of me and my
classmates.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She was super happy about it! She told me that she even ran all the
way over to our neighbors to show them!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But our closest neighbors live, like, five kilometers away from us,
y'know? Mom sure does love to get worked up over nothin'.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week happily continues to tell me about her mother and
hometown. It seems like she doesn't really have any problems with her
life here at the academy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Or so I thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that day, while out on a walk, I spot a stressed student raising
her voice at Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Um... S-sorry, could you say that again?

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Once more then! I'm asking why you pulled that crazy stunt during our
scrimmage yesterday! If you had just stayed put, I would've won!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Well, um... I-I also wanted to win, so y'know...

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text: But you already have your own trainer!

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text: So why'd you have to do that?! Couldn't you have just let me win?!

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
I don't have much time left! I gotta get scouted soon, or else I might
not get scouted at all! I won't be able to make it...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: "Won't be able to make it?" W-what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
It's my mom. She's been in and out of the hospital for as long as I can
remember. But lately, she's been getting worse. Even her doctor is
seriously worried.

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
She's been waiting ages for me to make my debut! She's the one who
pushed me this far... But at this rate, I won't be able to make it in
time...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Th-that's awful...

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
So please, Spe... Let me win the next scrimmage, okay? That'd be
okay, right?!

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text: We're friends... aren't we?

text_block_list.name: Spe's Classmate
text_block_list.text: Oh... Class is starting soon. Let's get going, Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: O-okay...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that day, Special Week runs in another scrimmage race. Her
usual grit and energy are missing, however, and she ends up in
seventh place.
